name: Literature Digest
description: Generate digests and extract references from academic paper source files.

prompts.gemini:
Please call the skill named "{{ skill.id }}".

Please ingest the source file at `{{ input.source_path }}`. The input may be markdown, PDF, or an extensionless file; determine format from file content as defined in SKILL.md.
Then generate artifacts below following the SKILL.md protocol:
1) `digest.md` (in `{{ parameter.language }}`)
2) `references.json`
3) `citation_analysis.json` (in `{{ parameter.language }}`)

Output the final JSON object to stdout logic as defined in SKILL.md.

Input Context:
- source_path: {{ input.source_path }}
- language: {{ parameter.language }}
